notes: The Acorn is a type of seed used to plant trees . Acorns can be planted on regular green grass , Hallowed grass , Corrupt grass , Crimson grass , Jungle grass , Sand , or Snow , where they will create saplings that will grow into trees, under the right conditions . Acorns are randomly dropped when cutting down or shaking trees and can also be purchased from the Dryad for 10 CC each.

The Presserator is a construction accessory that is purchased from the Traveling Merchant for 10 GC . It automatically places Actuators to objects when placing them. It requires Actuators to be in the player's inventory in order to function.

The Actuator is a mechanism item purchased from the Mechanic for 10 SC each, or harvested from sand traps , lava traps , boulder traps , or Dead Man's Chest traps. It has to be placed on a tile and connected with wiring to function. When activated, the tile it is on toggles between active and inactive state, effectively allowing any block to be toggled like Active or Inactive Stone Blocks . Like Wire, Actuators are normally invisible and only become visible when a mechanism item is held.

conditions: The Actuator is a mechanism item purchased from the Mechanic for 10 SC each, or harvested from sand traps , lava traps , boulder traps , or Dead Man's Chest traps. It has to be placed on a tile and connected with wiring to function. When activated, the tile it is on toggles between active and inactive state, effectively allowing any block to be toggled like Active or Inactive Stone Blocks . Like Wire, Actuators are normally invisible and only become visible when a mechanism item is held.

notes: Normal mode row
Normal mode row
Normal mode row

conditions: The Aglet is a pre-Hardmode movement accessory that can be found in surface Chests , Wooden Crates and Pearlwood Crates . It is also sold by the Skeleton Merchant for 2 GC 50 SC during a New Moon . While equipped, it increases the player's movement speed by 5%.

The Alchemy Table is a post- Skeletron crafting station used to craft potions , fertilizer , and Thrown Powder . It works almost identically to Placed Bottles when crafting potions, except that it has a 1/3 (33.33%) chance of not consuming ingredients. It can be found randomly in the Dungeon and can also be obtained by fishing in the Dungeon. They also count as a flat surface item , which is one of the required elements in order to make a house .

notes: Ale is a potion that grants the Tipsy debuff for 2 minutes when consumed. Ale can be crafted at a Keg or purchased from the Tavernkeep (Desktop, Console and Mobile versions) for 1 SC each.

conditions: The Amber Mosquito is a pet-summoning item that spawns a Baby Dinosaur that follows the player. When the player is far enough away or in midair, a pterosaur will carry it by the tail to continue following them. The Amber Mosquito can be obtained by putting Silt , Slush , or Desert Fossils (Desktop, Console and Mobile versions) into an Extractinator or Chlorophyte Extractinator (Desktop, Console and Mobile versions) . With Silt or Slush, it only has a 1/10,000 (0.01%) chance to drop, while with Desert Fossils it has a slightly higher chance of 27/100,000 (0.027%) . [ 1 ]

Amethyst is a gem found within the Underground and Cavern layers of a world. They are obtained by breaking special blocks that have noticeable purple gemstones embedded in it. They can also be extracted from Silt , Slush , or Desert Fossil by putting them in an Extractinator . Rarely, Amethyst can be found in bulk in its own Gemstone Cave mini biome, or in one that contains all of the other gems as well (besides Amber ). Out of all available gems, Amethyst is the least valuable gem.

notes: The Ammo Box is a furniture item. It can be purchased from the Arms Dealer for 10 GC in Hardmode .

conditions: Unlike equipment buff items , the Ammo Box must be placed in order to activate the buff. It can be mined with a pickaxe or drill and picked up again, even while the buff is active, which will not cancel the buff. Placement is only dependent on an adequate space of 2×2 tiles being available.

The Ancient Chisel is a construction accessory that increases mining speed by 25%, similarly to a Mining Potion . It can be found in Sandstone Chests in the top 4/7ths of the Underground Desert and in Oasis Crates and Mirage Crates obtained from fishing in the Oasis .

notes: The Angel Halo is a vanity accessory purchased from the Traveling Merchant for 40 GC .

conditions: The Anklet of the Wind is an accessory that gives a 10% bonus to movement speed. The effect also stacks with the movement speed bonus of the Aglet . It can be found in Jungle and Bramble Crates with a 19% chance, and also in Ivy Chests located in Jungle Shrines and at the base of a Living Mahogany Tree in the Underground Jungle with a 21.72% chance.

notes: The Anti-Portal Block is a Hardmode block that prevents portals from the Portal Gun or Portal Gun Station to form on it. It is purchased from the Traveling Merchant for 1 SC .

conditions: Antlion Eggs are background objects that are found in naturally-generated clusters in the Underground Desert . They spawn an Antlion Larva when hit with nearly any tool, weapon, or projectile.
The Antlion Mandible is a crafting material dropped by Antlions , Antlion Larvae , Antlion Chargers , and Antlion Swarmers found in the Desert and Underground Desert biomes .

notes: Normal mode row
Arcane Rune Wall is a background wall that is purchased from the Traveling Merchant for 2 SC 50 CC each. It is one of the few animated walls, as the runes displayed change every few seconds.

conditions: Armored Cavefish are a type of fish which are found uncommonly by fishing in the Underground , Cavern , and Underworld layers, in any biome (Desktop, Console and Mobile versions) except the Desert . They are used to craft Seafood Dinners and Endurance Potions .

notes: Normal mode row
Normal mode row

The Artisan Loaf is a permanent booster item that permanently increases the range that the player can access crafting stations by 4 tiles in all directions. The Artisan Loaf can be purchased from the Skeleton Merchant for 10 GC during a Waning Crescent , New Moon , or Waxing Crescent . It can also only be used once per player, and the Skeleton Merchant will cease to sell it once the player has consumed an Artisan Loaf.

Ash Grass Seeds are seeds used to plant Ash grass . They are purchased from the Dryad for 1 SC 50 CC each, when she is talked to in The Underworld . They can also be gathered by clearing Ash grass foliage in the Underworld. Ash trees can grow on planted Ash grass.

conditions: Ash Wood is a type of wood harvested from Ash trees found naturally growing in Ash forests . Ash trees can be cultivated by placing Acorns on top of Ash grass at any height.
Atlantic Cods are a type of fish which are found commonly by fishing in a Snow biome in any layer.

notes: The Autohammer is a Hardmode crafting station used to craft Shroomite Bars as well as Mini Nuke I and II . It can be purchased from the Truffle for 1 PC after Plantera has been defeated.
Normal mode row

quantityText: Badger's Hat (Desktop, Console and Mobile versions) (when defeated on the same day as the Wall of Flesh )
Badger's Hat (Desktop, Console and Mobile versions) (when defeated on the same day as the Eye of Cthulhu )

notes: The Balla Hat is a vanity item purchased from the Clothier after the Frost Legion has been defeated.
sourceRefName: Clothier after the Frost Legion has been defeated

notes: The Ball O' Fuse Wire is a Hardmode pet-summoning item that spawns a Dynamite Kitten , which resembles the Orange Tabby variant of the Town Cat , that follows the player. When the player is far enough away or in midair, the Kitten will ride towards them on a stick of Dynamite and immediately dismount when it is on solid ground. The Ball O' Fuse Wire can be purchased from the Zoologist for 50 GC after completing 70% (383 entries) of the Bestiary .

conditions: The Ball O' Hurt is a pre-Hardmode flail that has a 1/5 (20%) chance of being obtained from destroying Shadow Orbs found in The Corruption or a 1/5 (20%) chance from Corrupt Crates and Defiled Crates , which are fished in the Corruption.

Bamboo is a placeable block obtained by harvesting Bamboo stalks, which generate naturally in the Jungle biome, with any pickaxe or drill . It can also be found in Jungle and Bramble Crates . Bamboo can be used to craft themed furniture , blocks, and walls.

notes: The Bamboo Leaf is a pet-summoning item that spawns a Baby Red Panda to follow the player. When the player is far enough away or in midair, the Baby Red Panda will fly towards them while surfing on a bamboo leaf to catch up to them. The Bamboo Leaf can be purchased from the Traveling Merchant for 75 GC .

conditions: The Band of Regeneration is an accessory that can be found in Gold Chests in the Underground and Cavern biomes and in Living Mahogany Trees in the Underground Jungle . When equipped, it regenerates 1 health every second. This effect stacks with the player's natural health regeneration , but unlike the natural regeneration, does not slow or stop when the player is moving or being attacked.

The Band of Starpower is an accessory that increases the player's maximum mana by 20. The Band of Starpower has a 1/5 (20%) chance of being obtained from destroying Shadow Orbs found in the Corruption or a 1/5 (20%) chance from Corrupt Crates and Defiled Crates , which are fished in the Corruption. It can furthermore be crafted.
Barrels can only be harvested with a pickaxe or drill when empty.
Bass are a type of fish which are found plentifully by fishing in any biome that is not the Ocean or Desert in any layer.

notes: Normal mode row

The Beach Ball is a novelty item that can be purchased from the Party Girl for 20 CC . Using it creates an interactive beach ball for players to bounce around. After 2 seconds of sitting still or coming to a full stop and then being tapped, it reverts to its item form which can be picked up and reused.
The Beanie is a vanity item purchased from the Clothier for 1 GC , while living in the Snow biome .

conditions: The Bee Hive is a natural trap which spawns over time under Jungle grass ceilings of the Jungle and Underground Jungle . When a Bee Hive is hit, it falls to the ground and rolls, releasing 2–5 Bees upon breaking. If it falls into any liquid , it will not release any Bees upon breaking, and drop 2–5 Hive blocks instead. [ 1 ] It can be crafted and placed manually.

notes: The Bell is a Hardmode crafting material purchased from the Wizard for 1 GC . It is used to the craft the Fairy Bell , a light pet -summoning item.
Bernie's Button is a Hardmode , post- Plantera pet-summoning item that spawns Bernie to follow the player. Bernie's Button can be purchased from the Princess for 25 GC .

conditions: Unlike equipment buff items , the Bewitching Table must be placed in order to activate the buff. It can be mined with a pickaxe or drill and picked up again, even while the buff is active, which will not cancel the buff. Placement is only dependent on an adequate space of 3×3 tiles being available.

notes: Normal mode row
Normal mode row
Normal mode row

The Birdie Rattle is a pet-summoning item that spawns a Lil' Harpy that follows the player. The Lil' Harpy, when summoned, will fly above and behind the player, and will behave similar to the Zephyr Fish , continually flying around and looking side to side. It will never land and can fly through blocks. The Birdie Rattle can be purchased from the Traveling Merchant for 50 GC .
Normal mode row
